seo.title: Bed & Breakfast Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your B&B. Route unhappy guests to private feedback before it hits Google. Free forever, no credit card required.

h1: Review Management for Bed and Breakfasts

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Bed and Breakfasts
hero.subheading: Guests remember the stay, but they don’t always think to review. ReviewFlo helps you follow up after checkout.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every B&B Faces

items.heading: A lovely stay doesn’t always become a review
items.body: Guests head home and move on with their week.

items.heading: One off night can define your profile
items.body: Breakfast timing, noise, or room issues can show up online first.

items.heading: You’re hosting, not selling reviews
items.body: Asking at the table can feel out of place.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Bed and Breakfasts

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after checkout
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link when guests leave.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they message you instead of posting publicly.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star guests go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Fits a small property workflow
items.body: Send the link right after checkout.

items.heading: Private feedback first
items.body: You can address concerns before they become public reviews.

items.heading: Same link every stay
items.body: No complicated setup for a small team.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.a: Yes, when you ask right after checkout while the stay is fresh.
They rate 1–4 stars and send you a private message instead of going to Google.
No. It’s a link by text or email.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same core flow for review requests and private feedback. ReviewFlo is priced for small properties.

items.q: Can I use this if I only have a few rooms?
items.a: Yes. One link is enough to get started.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More B&B Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first request goes out in under 5 minutes.
